title: Remediation Report for Merida
summary: This report summarizes the security findings for Merida.

findings.title: Missing HTTP Strict Transport Security
findings.description: A baseline browser security response header was not observed.
findings.evidence: strict-transport-security was not present in the selected response headers.
findings.remediationHint: Enable HSTS after confirming HTTPS is stable for the site and subdomains.
findings.evidenceSummary: HSTS header was missing from the HTTP response.
remediationSteps: Configure HSTS header in web server.
verificationSteps: Verify HSTS header is present in response.

scope.title: Scope
scope.narrative: The scope of this assessment includes the public-facing web infrastructure.

authorization.title: Authorization
authorization.narrative: This assessment was conducted with proper authorization.

methodology.title: Methodology
methodology.narrative: Passive scanning and non-intrusive observation were used.

findingsOverview.title: Findings Overview
findingsOverview.narrative: One finding was identified during the assessment.

limitations.title: Limitations
limitations.narrative: Assessment was limited to passive observation.

remediationChecklist.title: Remediation Checklist
remediationChecklist.narrative: Follow the priority actions to remediate findings.

verificationGuidance.title: Verification Guidance
verificationGuidance.narrative: Verify remediation by re-running passive scan.
